initiatives.name: Under the Umbrella
initiatives.description: A queer-owned and operated bookstore providing a safe community space and mutual aid resources for the LGBTQ+ community in Salt Lake City. They offer a carefully curated selection of books centering queer voices and experiences, while fostering community connections and support through events, book clubs, and accessible pricing options.

initiatives.name: Salt Lake City Free Skool
initiatives.description: decentralized community education network in which skills, information, and knowledge are shared without hierarchy or the institutional environment of formal schooling.

initiatives.name: Salt Lake Community Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: We are a mutual aid collective practicing harm reduction and working to build resilient community structures in the Salt Lake Valley. Runs community fridges.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Salt Lake City
initiatives.description: Tues, Thurs and Sat. 11am at Richmond Park 444e 600s SLC, UT since 2004. Come get free food!

initiatives.name: Salt Lake Harm Reduction Project
initiatives.description: Syringe Exchange Program in SLC offering safe disposal, education, and COVID resources at no cost.

initiatives.name: Salt Lake Community Bail Fund
initiatives.description: Posts bail for individuals in need in Salt lake County. We are committed to ending pre-trial detention in Utah.

initiatives.name: Wasatch Tenants United
initiatives.description: Wasatch Tenants United is an organization commited to the needs of working people and tenants living in Salt Lake City.

initiatives.name: Armed Queers Salt Lake City
initiatives.description: The Armed Queers are a revolutionary LGBTQ organization dedicated to the defense, and success, of oppressed people’s movements.
